## Which convention

Which of the four conventions is your question about?

- [ ] Slash naming
- [ ] Brand-voice pre-flight
- [ ] Output paths

## Your specific case

Describe the skill or situation you're trying to handle.

## What you've tried

If you've drafted a skill, paste the relevant section.

## What's not working

Where does the convention not seem to fit your case?
